landing_metaTitle: TENTO - Ski & Snowboard Certification & Competition Scoring App
landing_metaDescription: A scoring management system for ski and snowboard certifications and competitions. A simple, easy-to-use cloud application where multiple judges can collaborate and score in real time.
landing_subtitle: Scoring management system for ski & snowboard certifications and competitions
landing_description: A simple, easy-to-use cloud application where multiple judges within an organization can collaborate and score in real time.
landing_featureOrgDesc: Manage judges by organization such as ski clubs or schools. Invite members and operate as a team.
landing_featureCertDesc: Efficiently manage and score ski and snowboard certifications including badge tests and prize tests.
landing_featureCompDesc: Aggregate scores across multiple events and auto-generate overall rankings. Share results in real time via public links.
landing_featureTrainingDesc: Ideal for judge training. Multiple judges score the same performance to identify and improve scoring inconsistencies.
landing_featureMultiJudgeDesc: Sync scoring from multiple judges in real time with 3-judge or 5-judge scoring systems. The chief judge can make final confirmations.
landing_featureMobileDesc: Optimized for smartphones and tablets. The UI is designed for on-site scoring operations.
landing_step1Desc: Create your organization such as a ski club or school. Individual use is also available.
landing_step2Desc: Create a certification, competition, or training session and issue a participation code.
landing_step3Desc: Share the participation code and each judge scores from their own device. Results are automatically synced.
landing_step4Desc: Auto-aggregate scoring results and export in Excel format. In competition mode, you can publish a scoreboard.
landing_pricingIntro: Plans tailored to your needs, from individual to organizational use
landing_ctaDescription: Create a free account, set up your organization, and streamline scoring for ski and snowboard certifications and competitions.
dashboard_noSessions: No active certifications, competitions, or training sessions.

settings_multiJudgeOn: The chief judge issues scoring instructions and all judges score the same athlete and event
settings_multiJudgeOff: Each judge freely selects athletes and events to score
settings_chiefOnly: * Only the chief judge can change settings
settings_needJudges: 3 or 5 judges are required to start scoring. Current judges: {count}
settings_5judgeDesc: Sum of 3 middle scores after removing highest and lowest from 5 judges
settings_scoreDiffHelp: Scores cannot be finalized if the difference between highest and lowest exceeds this value.
settings_scoringMethodChiefOnly: * Only the chief judge can change the scoring method
session_selectOrgHelp: Select the organization for this session
session_trainingModeDesc: Up to 100 judges with individual scoring display
session_trainingInfo: In training mode, scores are displayed individually per judge. No aggregation like 3-judge or 5-judge scoring is applied.
details_inviteNote: * Logged-in users can join the session using this code
details_guestInviteNote: * No account registration required to join
details_deleteScoreDataMessage:
All scoring data for this {mode} will be deleted.
Current scoring progress will also be reset.

This action cannot be undone.
details_removeGuestMessage:
Remove guest user "{name}" from the session?

This action cannot be undone.
details_removeJudgeMessage:
Remove judge "{name}" from the session?

This action cannot be undone.
details_deleteSessionMessage:
Session "{name}" will be permanently deleted.
All scoring data and participant information will be lost.

This action cannot be undone.
